01_initial_request.input_data: Wild-type cells and novel myristate-based probes with diazirine and alkyne functionality
01_initial_request.user_intent: To develop a technology platform to profile N-myristoylation-mediated protein-protein interactions in intact cells at the whole proteome level without genetic modification
01_initial_request.quantifiable_goal: Identification of multiple novel interactors for myristoylated proteins such as FSP1 and DDX46

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] N-myristoylation is a lipid PTM added to more than 200 human proteins, but approaches to capture PTM-driven PPIs are limited. [Gap] Existing photoactivatable myristate analogs are not suitable for metabolic incorporation due to bulky crosslinking moieties. [Decision] To achieve probe design compatible with NMT, chose to use structural analysis based on HsNMT1:Myr-CoA complex (PDB:4C2Y) to design diazirine-modified myristate probes at specific positions along the fatty acid chain.

parameters.diazirine_positions: specific positions along 14-carbon fatty acid chain

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Three photocrosslinkable clickable analogs designed: X3, X8, and X10 with diazirine at different positions

references.relevance: Describes structure-guided design based on HsNMT1:Myr-CoA complex

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Probe design completed based on structural analysis. [Gap] Probes need to be synthesized for experimental validation. [Decision] To achieve probe availability, chose to use chemical synthesis with ketone-to-diazirine transformation at the end of synthesis for X3 probe.

parameters.diazirine_formation: ammonia followed by hydroxylamine-o-sulfonic acid, then iodine oxidation

02_agent_trajectory.observation: X3 probe synthesized successfully with diazirine at β-position

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] X3 synthesis completed. [Gap] X8 and X10 probes require different synthesis approach due to diazirine position. [Decision] To achieve X8/X10 probe synthesis, chose to use Pd(0) catalyzed coupling with chloroanhydrides and alkyl zinc iodides for sp2-sp3 C-C coupling.

parameters.reagents: chloroanhydrides, alkyl zinc iodides generated from aliphatic alkyl iodides by Cu-Zn couple
parameters.ketone_precursors: 10 and 13 for X8 and X10 respectively

02_agent_trajectory.observation: X8 and X10 probes synthesized with diazirine at positions 8 and 10 respectively

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Probes X3, X8, X10 synthesized. [Gap] Need to validate metabolic incorporation into myristoylated proteome in cells. [Decision] To achieve probe validation, chose to use metabolic labeling in HeLa cells with probe incubation followed by CuAAC ligation and in-gel fluorescence.

parameters.probe_concentration: 100 μM for X3/X8/X10, 5 μM for YnMyr

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Protein labeling pattern observed for all probes without UV irradiation, resembling YnMyr labeling

references.relevance: Previous application of YnMyr for myristoylated proteome identification

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Metabolic labeling completed without UV. [Gap] Need to test photocrosslinking capability of diazirine probes. [Decision] To achieve photocrosslinking, chose to use UV irradiation at 365 nm for in-cell diazirine photoactivation.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Number and intensity of fluorescent bands greatly increased upon UV irradiation, attributed to lipid-protein crosslinking

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] UV photocrosslinking completed. [Gap] Need to confirm NMT-dependence of labeling. [Decision] To achieve NMT-dependence validation, chose to use NMT inhibitor IMP-366 treatment with increasing concentrations.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Majority of fluorescently labeled bands disappeared with increasing NMTi concentration, indicating NMT-dependent metabolic labeling

references.relevance: IMP-366 characterized as potent and selective NMT inhibitor

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] NMT-dependence confirmed. [Gap] Need to validate labeling of specific NMT substrate and test enrichment. [Decision] To achieve substrate validation, chose to use streptavidin-conjugated magnetic bead enrichment with azido-TAMRA-biotin capture reagent for PSMC1 detection.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Enrichment of PSMC1 observed with all alkynylated probes; NMT1 photocrosslinking detected only after denaturation at 95°C

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Individual probe validation completed. [Gap] Need proteome-wide assessment of labeling efficiency. [Decision] To achieve proteome-wide analysis, chose to use quantitative SILAC proteomics with heavy/light media and neutravidin enrichment.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Labeling of myristoylated proteins decreased on NMTi treatment; Pearson correlation >0.9 between YnMyr vs X10/X8, 0.84 vs X3

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] SILAC proteomics data generated. [Gap] Need to identify probe-modified peptides and crosslinks. [Decision] To achieve modified peptide identification, chose to use PEAKS de novo sequencing analysis package for MS/MS spectra analysis.

parameters.modification_search: Myr' for YnMyr, Myr'-N2 for X3/X8/X10, Myr-Xlink for crosslinks

02_agent_trajectory.observation: 121 PSMs with Myr' modification (28 known myristoylated proteins); 6-8 proteins with Myr'-N2 per diazirine probe; 140 PSMs for 33 proteins with Myr-Xlink modification

references.citation: Zhang et al., Mol. Cell. Proteomics, 2012, 11, M111.010587 (ref. 42)
references.relevance: PEAKS DB software for de novo sequencing assisted database search

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Proteome-wide crosslinks identified. [Gap] Need to confirm X10 as optimal substrate biochemically and structurally. [Decision] To achieve biochemical characterization, chose to use in vitro enzyme kinetics assay with CPM fluorescence detection comparing X10-CoA vs Myr-CoA.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Catalytic efficiency of X10-CoA and Myr-CoA very similar for both NMT1 and NMT2 with small change in KM

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Biochemical compatibility confirmed. [Gap] Need structural validation of X10-CoA binding mode in NMT active site. [Decision] To achieve structural validation, chose to use X-ray crystallography to solve HsNMT1:X10-CoA complex structure.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: X10-CoA binds at Myr-CoA binding site with diazirine at hydrogen bonding distance from T268 side-chain hydroxyl; RMSD 0.587Å over 355 Cα atoms vs native substrate complex

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] X10 validated as optimal probe. [Gap] Need to identify PTM-dependent PPIs for specific myristoylated proteins. [Decision] To achieve targeted PPI identification, chose to use HEK293 transfection with 20 myristoylated proteins bearing C-terminal Twin-Strep-tag followed by X10 treatment and UV crosslinking.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: TST-tagged constructs most strongly enriched; no significant enrichment in mCitrine control

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Transfection and crosslinking completed. [Gap] Need to enrich crosslinked interactors and eliminate non-covalent PPIs. [Decision] To achieve specific enrichment, chose to use Strep-Tactin resin enrichment with SDS denaturation prior to ligation.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Myristoylated TST-tagged proteins enriched; several constructs enriched putative photocrosslinked interactors

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Enrichment completed. [Gap] Need quantitative proteomic analysis to identify specific interactors. [Decision] To achieve interactor identification, chose to use label-free quantification proteomics comparing fold change against combined data of 19 other protein constructs.

parameters.comparison: fold change against 19 other protein constructs × 3 biological replicates

02_agent_trajectory.observation: DDX46 and FSP1 showed highest hit rates for putative photocrosslinked interactors

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] DDX46 interactors identified. [Gap] Need to validate DDX46-TRA2B interaction and test myristoylation dependence. [Decision] To achieve interaction validation, chose to use co-immunoprecipitation with DDX46-TST WT and G2A myristoylation-deficient mutant.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Both WT and G2A mutant interacted with TRA2B to similar extent, indicating interaction not mediated by myristoylation

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] DDX46 validation completed. [Gap] Need to validate FSP1-TOMM40 interaction and test myristoylation dependence. [Decision] To achieve FSP1 interaction validation, chose to use co-immunoprecipitation with FSP1-TST WT, G2A mutant, and NMT inhibitor treatment.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: TOMM40 co-immunoprecipitated with FSP1; interaction reduced to 22% with G2A mutant and 28% with NMTi treatment compared to WT

03_success_verification.validation_technique: Co-immunoprecipitation with Western blot validation, quantitative SILAC proteomics, and label-free quantification proteomics

FSP1_TOMM40_G2A_reduction.interpretation: FSP1 myristoylation essential for FSP1-TOMM40 interaction

FSP1_TOMM40_NMTi_reduction.interpretation: NMT inhibition similarly reduces FSP1-TOMM40 interaction

SILAC_correlation_YnMyr_X10.interpretation: X10 labels myristoylated proteins equivalently to YnMyr

SILAC_correlation_YnMyr_X3.interpretation: X3 shows slightly lower correlation, consistent with higher background reactivity

crystal_structure_resolution.interpretation: High-resolution structure confirms X10-CoA binding mode in NMT active site

identified_myristoylated_proteins.interpretation: Known myristoylated proteins identified via Myr' modification

03_success_verification.final_verdict: Research objective achieved. The technology platform successfully profiles N-myristoylation-mediated PPIs in wild-type cells at whole proteome level without genetic modification. Multiple novel interactors identified for FSP1 (including TOMM40) and DDX46 (including TRA2B, ACIN1, PPIG, SRRM2, TRA2A/B, ZC3H13). FSP1-TOMM40 interaction validated as myristoylation-dependent (22% remaining with G2A mutant, 28% with NMTi). X10 probe demonstrated optimal performance with Pearson correlation >0.9 vs YnMyr and confirmed binding mode via 2.37Å crystal structure (PDB:5NPQ).
